briefdescription.para: The user can directly manipulate the vector, they can't break anything anyway.

doubles reserved memory until resize(newSize) can be done without reallocation Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::Vector<MR::Vector<MR.ICPGroupPairs, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>resizeWithReserve.

doubles reserved memory until resize(newSize, value) can be done without reallocation Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::Vector<MR::Vector<MR.ICPGroupPairs, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>resizeWithReserve.

sets elements [pos, pos+len) to the given value, adjusting the size of the vector to include new elements; the elements in between old size and pos are also set to val (for faster implementation) Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::Vector<MR::Vector<MR.ICPGroupPairs, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>autoResizeSet.

sets the element #i to the given value, adjusting the size of the vector to include new element Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::Vector<MR::Vector<MR.ICPGroupPairs, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>autoResizeSet.

parameterdescription.para: type of index (shall be convertible to size_t) Generated from class MR::Vector<MR::Vector<MR::Vector<MR.ICPGroupPairs, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>. This is the non-const half of the class.
